# Mubin Attar — AI / ML Engineer

> Solo GenAI/ML engineer who ships real, live AI products. Signature principle: every number a user sees is genuinely computed — never faked.

## About
AI/ML Engineer based in Ahmedabad, India, with 3+ years building and shipping production AI end-to-end: GenAI/LLM applications, agentic & RAG systems, predictive ML models, and healthcare-AI automation. Core stack: FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker — with auth, CI/CD, and security hardening baked in.

## Live Projects (all multi-user, open-source)
- DBWhisper — natural-language-to-SQL agent: LangGraph pipeline, schema-aware pgvector retrieval, multi-LLM fallback, fail-closed read-only safety. https://dbwhisper.vercel.app
- LLM Studio — multi-user, ChatGPT-style AI SaaS: per-user tenancy, token streaming, multi-LLM routing, daily quotas. https://heisenbergblue-llm-studio.hf.space
- TradePulse — honest event-driven backtesting platform + AI copilot: look-ahead-free engine, costs modeled by default. https://tradepulse.vercel.app
- CrownWager — +EV sports-betting analytics: validated XGBoost model (65% CV), fair-odds edge, verifiable model track-record. https://crownwager.vercel.app
